title: AppInit_DLLs Registry Persistence
description: Detects modification of the AppInit_DLLs registry key, which causes listed DLLs to be injected into every process that loads user32.dll. This is a common malware persistence mechanism to ensure code execution across all GUI processes on the system.
falsepositives: Legitimate software using AppInit_DLLs for accessibility or input method DLLs
